title: helichrysum scabrum
intro: Helichrysum scabrum, also known as Rough Everlasting, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Native to the Mediterranean region, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum scabrum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Helichrysum scabrum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
